news.summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) released its first-quarter 2025 earnings, revealing an adjusted EPS of $7.20 compared to $6.91 in the previous year, falling short of the expected $7.29. Revenues also saw a 6.8% increase year over year, reaching $109.6 billion, missing the anticipated $111.60 billion. CEO Andrew Witty stated that the company did not meet their expectations and is actively working to address challenges. The first quarter medical care ratio rose to 84.8% from 84.3% in 2024, primarily due to ongoing Medicare funding cuts and changes in member demographics. Despite setbacks, UnitedHealth Group is aiming to return to its target earnings growth rate of 13 to 16%.
news.headline: UnitedHealth Group faces challenges as it slashes 2025 outlook due to Medicare funding reductions. Earnings up to $7.20, missing consensus; revenues $109.6B. CEO aims to return to 13-16% long-term growth.

news.summary: The Chairman of the Federal Reserve indicated that the central bank will maintain current borrowing costs amidst President Trump’s trade dispute. This decision has displeased investors and the president.
news.headline: Powell under pressure from markets and Trump over rates, signaling the Fed will maintain current borrowing costs despite criticism.

news.summary: In Hsinchu, Taiwan, TSMC (TWSE: 2330, NYSE: TSM) has submitted its 2024 annual report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report can be accessed online at https://investor.tsmc.com/english/sec-filings. For hard copies, individuals can request them via email at p_sec_service@tsmc.com. TSMC, established in 1987, is a trailblazer in the pure-play foundry sector and remains at the forefront as the top dedicated semiconductor foundry globally.
news.headline: TSMC files 2024 annual report on Form 20-F with SEC. Founded in 1987, TSMC is a leading semiconductor foundry.
italy Economy Minister: Italy to meet this year NATO's 2% target on defence spending.

news.summary: Bitcoin staking protocol Babylon experienced a significant unstaking event, with $1.26 billion worth of BTC being pulled out from its platform, causing a 32% drop in its total value locked (TVL). The blockchain analytics firm Lookonchain identified four addresses that had unstaked varying amounts of BTC, with one address comprising the majority of the unstaked assets at $1.1 billion. This event led to Babylon’s TVL falling from $3.97 billion to $2.68 billion. There is speculation about the identity of the unstakers, with some suggesting it could be related to the Chinese government or a strategic move by traders. The unstaking may be linked to a transition by the DeFi protocol Lombard Finance, as they mentioned unstaking Bitcoin as part of moving to a new set of providers. The unstaked BTC is expected to be restaked back into Babylon. This event followed an airdrop by Babylon for early adopters, which saw $21 million in BTC also being unstaked from the platform. Babylon, known for allowing native staking of Bitcoin, reached a TVL of over $6 billion in December.
news.headline: Babylon's TVL plunges by 32% as $1.26B in BTC gets unstaked, sparking speculations on fund movements and potential Chinese government involvement.

news.summary: In March, the average U.S. home that was placed under contract spent 47 days on the market, the lengthiest period for any March since 2019, as indicated by a recent report from Redfin. This is a stark contrast to the peak of the pandemic homebuying rush when homes were selling in less than half that time. This March marked the five-year anniversary since the declaration of the coronavirus pandemic, impacting various housing metrics in the U.S. The report was released by the technology-driven real estate brokerage Redfin, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol RDFN.
news.headline: US homes being sold at slowest pace in 6 years, with a typical home taking 47 days to sell in March, longest since 2019.

news.summary: SIX MINING is a platform in the UK that focuses on integrating low-carbon green energy into cryptocurrency mining. They are working towards compliance and standardization of blockchain infrastructure by collaborating with governments and research institutions. The platform is positioned to become a leader in the future "country + enterprise" cooperation model. With El Salvador potentially exporting volcanic energy and cooperating with platforms like SIX MINING, it could bring in revenue for the country and provide green computing resources for global crypto users. Investors are encouraged to consider the positive policies towards Bitcoin by El Salvador's President Bukele and other politicians, indicating a growing market confidence. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: SIX MINING combines cloud mining with low-carbon energy, aims to collaborate with governments for blockchain standardization.

news.summary: GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) has experienced a remarkable increase in its stock price over the last year, outperforming tech giants like Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA), Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA), and Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT). Shareholders have seen returns of over 154%, propelled by various factors such as the social media influence of trader Keith Gill, also known as "Roaring Kitty," and the company's embrace of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). This surge has left many Wall Street firms behind in the wake of GameStop's unexpected rise to prominence in the investing world.
news.headline: GameStop's stock surged 150% yearly, outperforming tech giants. Its memecoin had a 5X boost. Reach full story on Benzinga.

news.summary: QKS Group has released two reports on the global Network Detection and Response (NDR) market, projecting a valuation of $4.24 billion by 2030. The market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 17.46% from 2025 to 2030. NDR is crucial in combating sophisticated cyber threats targeting east-west traffic and encrypted payloads. NDR platforms offer real-time network visibility, behavioral threat detection, and AI-powered response orchestration, going beyond traditional perimeter defenses. Industries like finance, healthcare, e-commerce, and critical infrastructure are adopting intelligent NDR solutions to detect threats that evade conventional tools. These platforms utilize machine learning, behavioral analytics, and threat intelligence to proactively detect and contain threats across hybrid environments.
news.headline: QKS Group projects $4.24 billion valuation for NDR market by 2030, growing at 17.46% CAGR from 2025 to 2030. Industry leaders can capitalize on the evolving segment.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in the past five years.
